transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Tell me your work and move-in date.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m a Product Manager, and my partner Sophie works in marketing. We’re looking to move in next month. When would be a good time to view the flat?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Specify your exact move-in date and propose a viewing time.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: We’re aiming to move in around the 1st of next month. Would it be possible to view the flat this weekend?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Give a specific day and time for the viewing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: Saturday afternoon would work well for us. What time suits you best?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: State your exact move-in date again and confirm the viewing time.
